messages.content:
I can’t run tasks from here, but I can tell you exactly how to run "load test task 3" yourself — tell me which load-test tool and environment you use (k6, Locust, Artillery, JMeter, Gatling, Docker, CI runner, etc.) and the path of task 3 and I’ll give a precise command and any helper scripts.

Below are common run commands and quick notes for each popular tool so you can pick the one that matches your project.

k6
- Run a script: k6 run path/to/task3.js
- Example with options: k6 run --vus 200 --duration 5m path/to/task3.js
- Produce HTML report (requires k6 v0.43+ with reporter): k6 run --out json=results.json path/to/task3.js && k6 report --reporter html results.json -o report.html

Locust (Python)
- Headless run: locust -f path/to/task3.py --headless -u 100 -r 10 -t 10m --csv=task3-results
- Open web UI (interactive): locust -f path/to/task3.py and visit http://localhost:8089

Artillery (Node.js)
- Run YAML/JSON test: artillery run path/to/task3.yml
- With output file: artillery run --output results.json path/to/task3.yml
- Generate report: artillery report --input results.json --output report.html

JMeter
- Non-GUI run: jmeter -n -t path/to/task3.jmx -l results.jtl -j jmeter.log
- Convert results to CSV or HTML: jmeter -g results.jtl -o /path/to/html-report-dir

Gatling (Scala)
- If using the standard Maven plugin: mvn -Dgatling.simulationClass=com.example.Task3Simulation gatling:test
- Results are in target/gatling/

Docker (if tests packaged in image)
- Run container: docker run --rm -v $(pwd)/reports:/reports my-loadtest-image /bin/sh -c "k6 run /tests/task3.js --out json=/reports/results.json"
- Adjust image name, script path, and command for your test runner.

If you use a CI or orchestration (Kubernetes, GitHub Actions, Shipyard pipeline), tell me the pipeline/task name and I’ll give the exact steps to trigger it (e.g., shipyard CLI or curl to API) and to collect artifacts.

What I need from you to give an exact command right now:
- Which load-testing tool is used in this repo?
- Where is "task 3" located (file path or task name)?
- Target concurrency/users, duration, and any ramp-up settings you want
- Where to save results (local path, S3, CI artifacts, etc.)

Give those details and I’ll produce the one-line command and any wrapper script you should run.
